ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: The response is relevant and attempts to align with the persona but lacks naturalness in delivery, which could be more evasive.
[baseline_no_context] Listen here, friend or foe? In times like these, every penny counts and time's ticking away for us all.<TAB>3<TAB>2<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>Average relevance; lacks
The response shows some relevance to urgency but lacks Smuggler's opportunistic negotiation tactics and doesn't fully exploit the current chaotic situation.
